TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: mibalakasay a cepcep śÉ°šĹúŚäášĻčŚźĽ "mibalakasay a cepcep" "kamu nu Zipin, „ā§„āŅ„āļ„É©„Ā™Kiss, kamu nu Ing, It Started With A Kiss" nu Taywan masasumidangay i cacudadan nu masakapahay a igian, nisumadan misulit a kungku makau Zipunay sinmung misulitay tu bangga ci Tu-tyen-sin a banggaan "taw-ci-syaw-cin-cin" kamu nu Zipun„ā§„āŅ„āļ„É©„Ā™Kiss" saka 1 a cudad katukuh saka 10 a cudad, ci Cen-yen-cang, Lin-i-cen ku paazihay, ke-mi kanatal iga a kusi ku misanga'ay, cacay a ingaan sapalawpes tu kalisiw 120 mang ku kalisiw. "śÉ°šĹúŚäášĻčŚźĽ"(śó•Ť™ě:„ā§„āŅ„āļ„É©„Ā™Kiss,ŤčĪŤ™ě:It Started With A Kiss), Kiss)Á¨¨1 . 2004 a mihca 8 a bulad 16 a demiad mala ingatu, 2005 a nihca 8 a bulad 8 a demkiad malepun . 9 a bulad 25 a demiad malingatua i Taywan cung-se a saayaway patahkal. 2007 a mihca 3 a bulad man gga tu saka 11 a cudad katukuh 23 a cudad lalabuay malingatu misaiga tu "mibalakasay sakatusa a cepcep", i lecad a mihcaan 12 a bulad 16 a demiad tatenga'ay tu patahkal. uyni a igaan u walu tabakiay a tilibi makay 2001 a mihcaan u saayaway micukaymas tuyni igaan nayay ku kacacayat tu saayaway a nisanga'an tu tatangahan iga. katukuh 2023 a mihcaan, u icibangay nu Taywan a igian u sakanamuhan nu Cow-kow. "sakatusa umasakapahay a igaan liw-sin-hwa-yen". .
S.PHON: mibar~…ĺakasaj a ¶…ôp ¶…ôp ***** "mibar~…ĺakasaj a ¶…ôp ¶…ôp" "kamu nu zipin, *****kiss, kamu nu iŇč, it start…ôd witńß a kiss" nu tajwan masasumidaŇčaj i ¶a ¶udadan nu masakapańßaj a igian, nisumadan misur~…ĺit a kuŇčku makau zipunaj sinmuŇč misur~…ĺitaj tu baŇčga ¶i tu-tj…ôn-sin a baŇčgaan "taw- ¶i-sjaw- ¶in- ¶in" kamu nu zipun*****kiss" saka * a ¶udad katukuńß saka ** a ¶udad, ¶i ¶…ôn-j…ôn- ¶aŇč, r~…ĺin-i- ¶…ôn ku paazińßaj, k…ô-mi kanatar~…ĺ iga a kusi ku misaŇča Ē~ °aj, ¶a ¶aj a iŇčaan sapar~…ĺawp…ôs tu kar~…ĺisiw *** maŇč ku kar~…ĺisiw. "*****"(**:*****kiss,**:it start…ôd witńß a kiss), kiss)** . **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mar~…ĺa iŇčatu, **** a nińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômkiad mar~…ĺ…ôpun . * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatua i tajwan ¶uŇč-s…ô a saajawaj patańßkar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad man gga tu saka ** a ¶udad katukuńß ** a ¶udad r~…ĺar~…ĺabuaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu misaiga tu "mibar~…ĺakasaj sakatusa a ¶…ôp ¶…ôp", i r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu patańßkar~…ĺ. ujni a igaan u war~…ĺu tabakiaj a tir~…ĺibi makaj **** a mińß ¶aan u saajawaj mi ¶ukajmas tujni igaan najaj ku ka ¶a ¶ajat tu saajawaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu tataŇčańßan iga. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, u i ¶ibaŇčaj nu tajwan a igian u sakanamuńßan nu ¶ow-kow. "sakatusa umasakapańßaj a igaan r~…ĺiw-sin-ńßwa-j…ôn". .
S.FORM: mibalakasay a cepcep śÉ°šĹúŚäášĻčŚźĽ "mibalakasay a cepcep" "kamu nu Zipin, „ā§„āŅ„āļ„É©„Ā™Kiss, kamu nu Ing, It Started With A Kiss" nu Taywan masasumidangay i cacudadan nu masakapahay a igian, nisumadan misulit a kungku makau Zipunay sinmung misulitay tu bangga ci Tu-tyen-sin a banggaan "taw-ci-syaw-cin-cin" kamu nu Zipun„ā§„āŅ„āļ„É©„Ā™Kiss" saka 1 a cudad katukuh saka 10 a cudad, ci Cen-yen-cang, Lin-i-cen ku paazihay, ke-mi kanatal iga a kusi ku misanga'ay, cacay a ingaan sapalawpes tu kalisiw 120 mang ku kalisiw. "śÉ°šĹúŚäášĻčŚźĽ"(śó•Ť™ě:„ā§„āŅ„āļ„É©„Ā™Kiss,ŤčĪŤ™ě:It Started With A Kiss), Kiss)Á¨¨1 . 2004 a mihca 8 a bulad 16 a demiad mala ingatu, 2005 a nihca 8 a bulad 8 a demkiad malepun . 9 a bulad 25 a demiad malingatua i Taywan cung-se a saayaway patahkal. 2007 a mihca 3 a bulad man gga tu saka 11 a cudad katukuh 23 a cudad lalabuay malingatu misaiga tu "mibalakasay sakatusa a cepcep", i lecad a mihcaan 12 a bulad 16 a demiad tatenga'ay tu patahkal. uyni a igaan u walu tabakiay a tilibi makay 2001 a mihcaan u saayaway micukaymas tuyni igaan nayay ku kacacayat tu saayaway a nisanga'an tu tatangahan iga. katukuh 2023 a mihcaan, u icibangay nu Taywan a igian u sakanamuhan nu Cow-kow. "sakatusa umasakapahay a igaan liw-sin-hwa-yen". .
S.PHON: mibar~…ĺakasaj a ¶…ôp ¶…ôp ***** "mibar~…ĺakasaj a ¶…ôp ¶…ôp" "kamu nu zipin, *****kiss, kamu nu iŇč, it start…ôd witńß a kiss" nu tajwan masasumidaŇčaj i ¶a ¶udadan nu masakapańßaj a igian, nisumadan misur~…ĺit a kuŇčku makau zipunaj sinmuŇč misur~…ĺitaj tu baŇčga ¶i tu-tj…ôn-sin a baŇčgaan "taw- ¶i-sjaw- ¶in- ¶in" kamu nu zipun*****kiss" saka * a ¶udad katukuńß saka ** a ¶udad, ¶i ¶…ôn-j…ôn- ¶aŇč, r~…ĺin-i- ¶…ôn ku paazińßaj, k…ô-mi kanatar~…ĺ iga a kusi ku misaŇča Ē~ °aj, ¶a ¶aj a iŇčaan sapar~…ĺawp…ôs tu kar~…ĺisiw *** maŇč ku kar~…ĺisiw. "*****"(**:*****kiss,**:it start…ôd witńß a kiss), kiss)** . **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mar~…ĺa iŇčatu, **** a nińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômkiad mar~…ĺ…ôpun . * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatua i tajwan ¶uŇč-s…ô a saajawaj patańßkar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad man gga tu saka ** a ¶udad katukuńß ** a ¶udad r~…ĺar~…ĺabuaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu misaiga tu "mibar~…ĺakasaj sakatusa a ¶…ôp ¶…ôp", i r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu patańßkar~…ĺ. ujni a igaan u war~…ĺu tabakiaj a tir~…ĺibi makaj **** a mińß ¶aan u saajawaj mi ¶ukajmas tujni igaan najaj ku ka ¶a ¶ajat tu saajawaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu tataŇčańßan iga. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, u i ¶ibaŇčaj nu tajwan a igian u sakanamuńßan nu ¶ow-kow. "sakatusa umasakapańßaj a igaan r~…ĺiw-sin-ńßwa-j…ôn". .
